languages.text: "Это не затронет эффективность мануфакторумов и повысит эффективность выполнения Процедуры. Блестящее решение".
"This will not impact the efficiency of the manufactorums and will increase the Procedure's effectiveness. A brilliant solution."
languages.original_text: "Это не затронет эффективность мануфакторумов и повысит эффективность выполнения Процедуры. Блестящее решение".

traits.locale_text: "This will not impinge upon the manufactorums' efficiency, and will increase the Procedure's effectiveness. A brilliant solution."
"This will not impinge upon the manufactorums' efficiency, and will increase the Procedure's effectiveness. A brilliant solution."
"This will not impact the efficiency of the manufactorums and will increase the Procedure's effectiveness. A brilliant solution."
"This will not impact the efficiency of the manufactorums and will increase the Procedure's effectiveness. A brilliant solution."

languages.text: "Das wirkt sich nicht nur auf die Effizienz der Manufactorien aus, sondern erhöht gleichzeitig die Effektivität der Prozedur selbst. Eine brillante Lösung."
languages.original_text: "This will not impact the efficiency of the manufactorums and will increase the Procedure's effectiveness. A brilliant solution."

traits.locale_text: "Das wirkt sich nicht nur auf die Effizienz der Manufactorien aus, sondern erhöht gleichzeitig die Effektivität der Prozedur selbst. Eine brillante Lösung."

languages.text: « Cela n'aura aucun impact sur la productivité des manufactorums et augmentera l'efficacité de la Procédure. Une solution des plus brillantes. »
languages.original_text: "This will not impact the efficiency of the manufactorums and will increase the Procedure's effectiveness. A brilliant solution."

traits.locale_text: « Cela n'aura aucun impact sur la productivité des manufactorums et augmentera l'efficacité de la Procédure. Une solution des plus brillantes. »

languages.text: «Esto aumentará la efectividad del Procedimiento sin afectar al rendimiento de los manufactorums. Es una solución brillante».
languages.original_text: "This will not impact the efficiency of the manufactorums and will increase the Procedure's effectiveness. A brilliant solution."

traits.locale_text: «Esto aumentará la efectividad del Procedimiento sin afectar al rendimiento de los manufactorums. Es una solución brillante».

languages.text: "Bu, manufaktorumların verimliliğini etkilemeyecek ve prosedürün etkinliğini artıracaktır. Zekice bir çözüm."
languages.original_text: "This will not impact the efficiency of the manufactorums and will increase the Procedure's effectiveness. A brilliant solution."

traits.locale_text: "Bu, manufaktorumların verimliliğini etkilemeyecek ve prosedürün etkinliğini artıracaktır. Zekice bir çözüm."

languages.text: “这并不会影响制造工厂的效率，反而会提高程序的执行效率。很高明的解决方案。”
languages.original_text: "This will not impact the efficiency of the manufactorums and will increase the Procedure's effectiveness. A brilliant solution."

traits.locale_text: “这并不会影响制造工厂的效率，反而会提高程序的执行效率。很高明的解决方案。”
